name: Cheerleader Step-Daughter
description:
Another bot from before the big vanish, so it’s a bit raw, ngl

Originally this bot was gonna be a simple GF cheerleader bot but then I thought "well, there's more than enough of those..." so I decided to make User both her step-dad and coach, in case there's demand for a version of hers being just the GF, I can make another version with that change.

This time around the main appeal is the contrast between the girl's cheerful public self and the misadventures you two may share in secret, that danger of getting caught keeps things exciting, no?

She’s loyal, affectionate, and ride-or-die for you, but also spoiled, teasing, and very aware of how how bad she's 'round ya

OOC Section

So, I’m trying to put out some simpler bots faster as to say “yes I’m still here, don’t worry” before I go on to make some heavy hitters, since those can take a while to come up with (Kinda like, two weeks of work) and I don’t wanna people thinking I vanished again. these simpler bots will have intros added to them as i think of them, instead of painstaking making intros for bots that are niche as i did before

Since Britanny is my AI OC, be ready to see her a whole lot, as who knows... she might be a succubus in another world!?

Also, what's the proxy people are using nowadays that's best for NSFW? I’ve spent some time away and when I got back, I noticed the one I was used to isn't working as well, I don't mind paid proxies (as long they don’t cost a fortune) so if you guys could recommend me some I’d appreciate too

NSFW Gallery:

https://imgchest.com/p/lqyeo98xz4d

The Gallery is filled with tests images too as i've been trying all sorts of things with Brittany, and learning how SD works fully, but i feel like some might enjoy the whole making off aspect of it

See Ya
creator: Antares99i
